code: import React,{useEffect,useState}from'react';import API_BASE_URL from'../config';import'./StaffPerformance.css';import{jsxs as _jsxs,jsx as _jsx}from"react/jsx-runtime";const StaffPerformance=()=>{const[staff,setStaff]=useState([]);const[error,setError]=useState(null);useEffect(()=>{const fetchStaffPerformance=async()=>{try{console.log('Fetching staff performance data...');const response=await fetch("".concat(API_BASE_URL,"/staff-performance"));console.log('Response status:',response.status);if(!response.ok){throw new Error('Failed to fetch staff performance');}const data=await response.json();console.log('Fetched data:',data);setStaff(data);}catch(err){console.error('Error fetching staff performance:',err);setError(err.message);}};fetchStaffPerformance();},[]);if(error){return/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"error",children:["Error: ",error]});}return/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"staff-performance-container",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("h1",{children:"Staff Performance"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("table",{className:"staff-performance-table",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("thead",{children:/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("tr",{children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("th",{children:"Staff Name"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("th",{children:"Attendance Records"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("th",{children:"Production Participation"})]})}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("tbody",{children:staff.map(member=>/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("tr",{children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("td",{children:member.name}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("td",{children:member.attendance_records}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("td",{children:member.production_participation})]},member.id))})]})]});};export default StaffPerformance;
